_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assure successful implementation and functionality of security requirements and appropriate information technology (IT) policies and procedures that are consistent with the organization's mission and goals.
reference_document_element_description: Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies covering quality, privacy, security, ethics, and responsible use.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.547), RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.531).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.595). Shared vocabulary: [policies, security]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, assure, consistent, functionality, goals, implementation] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.864, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 25-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Assure successful implementation and functionality of security requirements and" and "Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies coverin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.574 ≈ STS 0.595 (gap 0.021). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [policies, security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [policies, security]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, assure, consistent, functionality, goals, implementation]. WIDAI-only: [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise].
